import React from 'react' import c from './add.module.scss' import { Icons } from '../../assets/icons' import { InputMask } from '@react-input/mask'; const AddClient = ({setActive}) => { const [count, setCount] = React.useState(1) const [ data, setData ] = React.useState({ name: '', phone: '', date: '', services: [], product: { name: '', price: '', count: '' } }) React.useEffect(() => { setData(prev => ({ ...prev, services: Array.from({ length: count }, (_, i) => prev.services[i] || { name: '', assigned: '', price: '' }) })); }, [count]); const updateService = (index, field, value) => { setData(prev => { const updatedServices = [...prev.services]; updatedServices[index] = { ...updatedServices[index], [field]: value }; return { ...prev, services: updatedServices }; }); }; return (

))}
